response.justification: The candidate has extensive software engineering experience but no background in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerators, or hardware optimization. All experience is in full-stack web development and geospatial systems, while the role requires principal-level expertise in hardware-software co-design and AI accelerator performance analysis.
strengths: 16+ years of professional software development across diverse domains demonstrating adaptability
Systems-level thinking and performance optimization experience in high-traffic backend services
Strong technical leadership and mentorship demonstrated through workshops and open-source projects
concerns: Zero background in SoC design, IP modeling, or hardware architecture—entire career is software-focused
No demonstrated experience with AI accelerators, deep learning workloads, or GPU optimization
Missing required educational path for Bachelor's degree: needs 8+ years in hardware/AI domain, not web development

key_factors.factor: No SoC/IP modeling or hardware architecture experience
No AI accelerator or deep learning optimization background
Software development expertise doesn't transfer to hardware domain
